title: Add all properties of an ingredient as a column in the IngredientsTable
In the dropdown to filter select the columns in the IngredientsTable can you make it the human friendly name

When you click on an ingredient and the IngredientDetailModel appears, can you make the values editable? When edited it should update the ingredient in the database. Initially just make the name of the ingredient editable

Can you create a new page where we can edit suppliers? We should add tabs to the application one for ingredients and one for suppliers. Suppliers should list in a table and should edit in the same way by opening a dialog when you click them

When opening an ingredient make all the fields editable. There are some rules that need to be ofllowed: Category, Type, Status, Brand  needs to be Select as they're enums, Supplier name needs to be a dropdown that uses the supplier name but updates the supplier
